name: Ross-on-Wye Riverside & Prospect
dog_lead_policy: On lead in town and Prospect
highlights: Classic Wye market town with Georgian views and riverside promenade.
points_of_interest: The Prospect (John Kyrle, 'Man of Ross'); St Mary's Church; Market House (1660)
viewpoints: The Prospect viewpoint over the Wye horseshoe
food_drink_nearby: The White Lion Inn; The Hope & Anchor (riverside); Pots & Pieces tea room
toilets: Riverside car park and town centre
hazards_notes: English side — technically Herefordshire — 15 min from Monmouth
